E. coli AST data from Mills et al 2022

Source: R/data.R
pheno_eco_2075.Rd

Phenotyping data published in Mills et al, Genome Medicine (2022) 14:147, downloaded via EBI AMR portal, and imported to AMRgen phenotype table format. Corresponding genotype data is available in geno_eco_2075.

Usage

pheno_eco_2075

Format

pheno_eco_2075 A data frame with 37350 rows and 37 columns representing MIC results for 2075 E. coli isolates tested against 18 drug agents, using BD Phoenix.

Columns include:

  • id: Sample identifier (BioSample).

  • drug_agent: Antibiotic identifier, as class 'ab'.

  • mic: MIC data, as class 'mic'.

  • pheno_provided: S/I/R phenotypes as downloaded from EBI.

  • ...: Additional data columns from EBI.

Source

https://www.ebi.ac.uk/amr

On this page

Free and Open Source (GPL-3), brought by AMRverse/AMRgen Development Team

AMRverse is an ecosystem for AMR data science. We aim to make common tasks easier and faster, via interoperable tools and resources.
